title: Dev Resource Category File
description: Schema for a single category file under data/categories/*.json

category.description: Human-readable category name, e.g. 'Source Code Hosting'

slug.description: URL/anchor-safe id for the category, e.g. 'source-code-hosting'

description.description: One or two sentence summary of what this category covers

pricingModel.description: free = entirely free product. freemium = perpetual free tier + paid upgrade. free-trial = time-boxed trial only, no perpetual free tier. open-source = free/self-hostable OSS, may have a paid hosted option. paid = no meaningful free tier, included as a notable paid utility for comparison.

summary.description: 1-3 sentence description of what the product does

freeTier.description: Specific, concrete limits of the free offering (quota, seats, storage, requests/month, duration). Use 'N/A' if pricingModel is 'paid'.

paidFrom.description: Entry-level paid plan price/limits, if known. Optional.

notes.description: Optional caveats, gotchas, or standout details (rate-limit resets, regional restrictions, sign-up requirements like credit card)

alternativeTo.description: Optional: well-known paid product this is commonly compared to

lastVerified.description: YYYY-MM-DD date this entry's pricing/limits were last checked
